characters.name: Adam
characters.description: AdamDebutBook 5The IntruderBirthdayMarch 16[1]GenderMaleSpeciesAlienRelationshipsFamilySheriffValenti(father figure)FriendsMichael GuerinLiz OrtechoMax EvansIsabel EvansAlex ManesMaria DeLucaRomancesLiz OrtechoFateStatusDeceasedCause of deathMurdered by DuPris with a Stone of Midnight[2] Adamis a character in theRoswell Highbook series. He is an alien who was raised in a secretProject Clean Slatefacility. Adam has light brown hair and pale green eyes. Despite being about the same age as the others, Adam seems young for his age. Since he hasn't been raised with anyone else his own age, he is socially underdeveloped. After initially leaving the confines of Project Clean Slate, Adam has symptoms of agoraphobia, a fear of wide open spaces. But he steadily adapts and gets more comfortable going outside. After being essentially alone in the Project Clean Slate compound, Adam doesn't want to be alone again. He wants to go to school with his friends, but he can't enroll because it would bring questions about his origins, so he once disguises himself as Max and Liz gives him a tour. Despite the obvious problems Max has being connected to thecollective consciousness, Adam thinks it wouldn't be so bad because you'd never be alone.

Despite the obvious problems Max has being connected to thecollective consciousness, Adam thinks it wouldn't be so bad because you'd never be alone.

characters.name: Alex Manes
characters.description: Season 2 character posterAlex GuerinDebut1.01PilotPortrayed byTyler BlackburnGenderMaleSpeciesHumanOccupationAirman (formerly)Deep SkyTitlesCaptain(rank)RelationshipsFamilyManes familyJesse Manes(father)†Flint Manes(brother)Gregory Manes(brother)Clay Manes(brother)Mindy Manes(mother)Harlan Manes†(great-grandfather)Tripp Manes†(great-granduncle)FriendsMaria DeLucaLiz OrtechoKyle ValentiRomancesMichael Guerin(husband)Forrest(ex-boyfriend)FateStatusAlive Deep Sky Alexander "Alex" Manes[1]is one of the main characters onThe CWscience fiction seriesRoswell, New Mexico. He is a military veteran (USAF Captain / commissioned officer) who suffers from physical and psychological trauma. In order to live up to his father's expectations, Alex must give up on the man he loves and their future together. Alex is portrayed byTyler Blackburn. Alex loves music. He plays guitar, which he loans to Michael.[2]He attended Battle of the Bands in high school.[3] Alex seems to be really into science-fiction and fantasy series, and he commonly makes pop culture references related to the genre. He corrects Kyle by pointing out that Jedi are psychics, and seems shocked when Kyle confusesStar WarswithStar Trek. He teasesTravis Guntherby asking him if his ring prevents him from burning up in daylight, a reference toThe Vampire Diariesseries. He had a lizard in high school that he named Willow after the character inBuffy the Vampire Slayer.

characters.name: Alex Whitman
characters.description: Alex WhitmanDebutPilotPortrayed byColin HanksBornAlexander Charles WhitmanBirthday1983SpeciesHumanOccupationBass player forThe WhitsStudent atRoswell HighAllegianceThe Pod SquadAliasAlexRelationshipsFamilyMr. Whitman (father)Gloria Whitman (mother)FriendsMaria DeLucaLiz ParkerRomancesIsabel Evans(soulmate)FateStatusDeceasedCause of deathKilled by Tess Alex Whitmanis a principal character onRoswell. He is portrayed byColin Hanks. Alex is a sweet, smart, witty and funny guy, who goes to great lengths to always be there for his friends. Alex is charming and gets along with almost everyone at school, possessing an ability to make people around him feel at ease. He is also very direct and not afraid to call his friends out when they're not being real with him, which happens a lot early on in their sophomore year as Alex is left out of the loop by Maria and Liz for a while. Alex is a bass player and music fiend. He starts a band his sophomore year, who are chosen to open for a big name at a radio contest in Roswell. characters.name: Amy DeLuca
characters.description: Amy DeLucaDebutHeat WavePortrayed byDiane FarrSpeciesHumanOccupationSelf-employed alien tourist businessRelationshipsFamilyMaria DeLuca(daughter)Sean DeLuca(nephew)Breepa DeLuca (Father)RomancesJim ValentiFateStatusAliveAmy DeLucais a recurring character on The WB sci-fi seriesRoswell. She is the single mother ofMaria DeLuca. Amy is portrayed byDiane Farr. Amy is a strong-willed, creative and fierce woman, who runs her own souvenir business in Roswell, New Mexico. She is the single mother ofMaria DeLuca, and the love interest ofJim Valenti, whom she first met at a protest to protect Native American architecture, when he arrested her. He later revealed, that he only arrested her because she was the only one he really noticed, and because she was cute. It is loudly implied that Amy had a rebellious streak as a teenager, and that's how she wound up being a mother at such a young age. She got caught in a whirlwind romance with a man who was no good for her, Maria's father, and she says that she doesn't regret a minute of it, because she wound up with Maria. Amy is trying desperately to make ends meet, and does just about any job she possibly can to help. She has a sometimes sketchy relationship with her daughter, when confronted with the issue of romance, because Maria doesn't think she deserves to tell her what she can and cannot do due to all the mistakes she made when she was younger. Jim and Amy had a relationship for a brief time, but they break things off after Amy decides it might just be another mistake.Tess Hardinginvites Amy over for Christmas dinner, and Jim and Amy seem to strike things up again because later Maria andKyleare seen talking about how embarassing it is that they are always making out at every opportunity. Although things were never made official. Amy is a strong-willed, creative and fierce woman, who runs her own souvenir business in Roswell, New Mexico. characters.name: Anatsa Mufaro
characters.description: Anatsa MufaroAppears inRoswell, New MexicoDebut3.01HandsPortrayed bySibongile MlamboGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanOccupationSinger, ReporterRelationshipsRomancesMax Evans(fling)Isobel Evans-Bracken(ex-girlfriend)FateStatusAlive Isobel Evans-Bracken(ex-girlfriend) Anatsa Mufaro[1]is a character in The CW 2019 television seriesRoswell, New Mexico. She is a singer and she andMax Evanshave a one-night-stand. Eventually,Isobel Evansbecomes interested in her and they begin dating. Anatsa is portrayed bySibongile Mlambo.

characters.name: Ann Evans
characters.description: Ann EvansDebut1.08Barely BreathingPortrayed byClaudia BlackGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanRelationshipsFamilyMax Evans(adopted son)Isobel Evans(adopted daughter)Dave Evans(husband)FateStatusAliveAnn Evansis a character on The CW science fiction seriesRoswell, New Mexico. She is the adoptive mother ofMaxandIsobel. In 1997, Ann and her husband went to a group home intending to adopt one child, and they ended up adopting both Max and Isobel. The third child at the home,Michael, was drawing asymbolall over the walls at the time. Max shows Ann the drawing of the alien symbol and asks if she recognizes it, and she recalls that the third child at the group home was drawing it when she went to adopt Max and Isobel.

characters.name: Arizona
characters.description: ArizonaPortrayed bySonya BalmoresGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanOccupationFaith healerRelationshipsFriendsChianaFateStatusAlive Arizonais a guest character on The CW science fiction seriesRoswell, New Mexico. She is a faith healer, and the alien symbol is part of the art she uses on her flyers. Arizona works as a faith healer, but she can't actually heal and she thinks the "redneck idiots" who come to her are "too stupid to see through it." Arizona works as a faith healer, but she can't actually heal and she thinks the "redneck idiots" who come to her are "too stupid to see through it."

characters.name: Arturo Ortecho
characters.description: Arturo OrtechoAppears inRoswell, New MexicoDebut1.01PilotPortrayed byCarlos CompeanDavid Baca(in 1987)Birthdayc. 1962Age56 in 2018(season 1)25 in 1987[1]GenderMaleSpeciesHumanOccupationOwner ofCrashdown CafeRelationshipsFamilyHelena Ortecho(ex-wife)Rosa Ortecho(Legal daughter)Liz Ortecho(daughter)FateStatusAlive Arturo Ortechois a supporting character onThe CWscience fiction seriesRoswell, New Mexico. He isLizandRosa's father and the owner of theCrashdown Cafe. Arturo is portrayed byCarlos Compean. Arturo migrated to the United States unlawfully and established theCrashdown Cafe. His wife left when their children were young, and he raised Liz and Rosa as a single father.

characters.name: Bert
characters.description: BertAppears inRoswell, New MexicoDebut2.02Ladies and Gentlemen We Are Floating in SpacePortrayed byLa'Charles TraskGenderMaleSpeciesHuman Bertis a minor recurring character in The CW 2019 television seriesRoswell, New Mexico. He hangs around theWild Pony, attending both  Woman As Warrior class and an open mic night. Bert is portrayed by La'Charles Trask. Bert attendsMaria DeLuca's Woman As Warrior class, which is held in the parking lot of the Wild Pony. He "thought it was a palates class", but Maria takes his money and tells him there's a goddess in everyone. When Maria asks everyone to write down their fears, Bert says aloud that his fear is werewolves.[1]

characters.name: Blaire
characters.description: BlaireAppears inRoswell, New MexicoDebut2.06Sex and CandyPortrayed bySarah MinnichGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanOccupationBarkeepRelationshipsRomancesIsobel Evans-Bracken Blaireis a character in The CW 2019 television seriesRoswell, New Mexico. She is a bartender atPlanet 7. Blaire is portrayed by Sarah Minnich. Blaire has long blonde hair and fair skin. Blaire is welcoming when Isobel first arrives at Planet 7, such as explaining why they use so much glitter, and bringing Isobel andKyle"meteor shower shooters" on the house.

characters.name: Bonnie
characters.description: BonnieAppears inRoswell, New MexicoDebut4.01Steal My SunshinePortrayed byZoe CipresGenderFemaleSpeciesOasianRelationshipsRomancesMichael Guerin(Kissed)Max Evans(Kissed)TriadClyde,TezcaFateStatusAlive Max Evans(Kissed) Bonnieis a character in The CW 2019 television seriesRoswell, New Mexico, first introduced inseason 4, and portrayed byZoe Cipres. Bonnie is "half of the duo of thieves who roll into town to hit up a few of Roswell’s banks, determined to take what they believe to be rightfully theirs. Despite her impulsive nature, Bonnie is a caring, voraciously curious woman, struggling to find her place on this Earth – somethingMichael Guerincan relate to."[1] TBA

characters.description: BonnieAppears inRoswell, New MexicoDebut4.01Steal My SunshinePortrayed byZoe CipresGenderFemaleSpeciesOasianRelationshipsRomancesMichael Guerin(Kissed)Max Evans(Kissed)TriadClyde,TezcaFateStatusAlive Max Evans(Kissed) Bonnieis a character in The CW 2019 television seriesRoswell, New Mexico, first introduced inseason 4, and portrayed byZoe Cipres. Bonnie is "half of the duo of thieves who roll into town to hit up a few of Roswell’s banks, determined to take what they believe to be rightfully theirs. Despite her impulsive nature, Bonnie is a caring, voraciously curious woman, struggling to find her place on this Earth – somethingMichael Guerincan relate to."[1] TBA

characters.name: Nikolas Branson
characters.description: Nikolas from the audiobook coverNikolas BransonDebutBook 2The Wild OneGenderMaleSpeciesAlienOccupationHigh school studentRelationshipsFamilyUnnamed adoptive parentsRomancesIsabel EvansFateStatusDeceasedCause of deathGunshot wound Nikolas Bransonis a character in theRoswell Highbook series. He debuts as a main character of the second bookThe Wild One. He is a high school student who returns to Roswell and is later revealed to be an alien. He becomes romantically involved withIsabel Evans. Lizdescribes Nikolas:[1] Nikolas is disdainful of humans. The first time he speaks with the group, he interrupts Liz, saying, "I don’t listen to insects."[5]He knocks out a security guard and likens it to "swatt[ing] a fly or stepp[ing] on a cockroach."[6]He later casually attacks Liz and causes a brain bleed, and she would have died if Max hadn't been there to heal her.[7] Nikolas is casual about using his powers, and he uses them often in public without regard to being caught.

characters.name: Brody Davis
characters.description: Taken over by LarekBrody DavisDebutAsk NotPortrayed byDesmond AskewSpeciesHumanOccupationOwner atUFO centerRelationshipsFamilySydney Davis (daughter)RomancesMaria DeLuca(crush)FateStatusAliveBrody Davisis a recurring character inSeason 2ofRoswell. He is portrayed by Desmond Askew. Davis is a millionaire who takes over ownership of the UFO Center where Max Evans works. On a number of occasions, he claims to have been abducted by aliens. He tells Maria DeLuca that, in essence, his mind would go blank and he would awaken a few days later lacking knowledge of where he had been or what he had been doing. In reality, his body was being used as a vessel by aliens to come to Earth. He later tries to develop a device that will "open a part of his brain" that he believes contains memories of where he had been taken. This device malfunctions and the resulting shock reveals previously unknown memories to him, which leaves him confused and afraid. After this happens, he takes Max Evans, Tess Harding, Liz Parker, Maria, her mother and her cousin hostage. Max is able to heal the damage to part of Brody's brain using his healing power, while Michael Guerin and Isabel Evans hold up the FBI outside. Brody is able to elude charges related to the hostage situation, as he is made to forget what happened. He has a daughter who is very ill and needs a bone marrow transplant, but Max heals her while she is in the hospital. characters.name: Brooke Taylor
characters.description: Brooke TaylorAppears inRoswell, New MexicoDebut3.04Walk on the OceanPortrayed byGillian VigmanGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanOccupationSheriff of Chaves CountyTitlesSheriff Brooke Tayloris a recurring character in The CW 2019 television seriesRoswell, New Mexico, first introduced inseason 3. She is the newsheriff of Chaves County. Brooke Taylor is portrayed byGillian Vigman. Brooke is "a tough yet charismatic officer elected on a mandate of law and order. A politician with years of experience navigating the divisive landscape amid rising tensions, she uses a disarming façade to appease both her constituents and the forces who put her in power, causing Max to question whether she’s truly for the people – or her own agenda."[1] Brooke is "a tough yet charismatic officer elected on a mandate of law and order. A politician with years of experience navigating the divisive landscape amid rising tensions, she uses a disarming façade to appease both her constituents and the forces who put her in power, causing Max to question whether she’s truly for the people – or her own agenda."[1]

characters.name: Chad Hinkle
characters.description: Chad HinkleAppears inRoswell, New MexicoPortrayed byMorse BicknellGenderMaleSpeciesHumanOccupationICE agentTitlesAgentRelationshipsFamilyUnnamed sisterUnnamed niece Agent Chad Hinkleis a recurring character in The CW 2019 television seriesRoswell, New Mexico. He is an agent with ICE who arrestsArturo Ortecho. Chad Hinkle is portrayed by Morse Bicknell. When ICE raidsRoswell Community Medicalhospital, Hinkle tries to enter a patient's room, butNurse Katestands in his way and refuses to let him enter and interfere with patient care. WhenLiz Ortechotries to leave with her father, Hinkle and ICE stops them. Although Liz shows Arturo's paperwork, Hinkle still arrests Arturo.

characters.description: CharlieCharlie CameronDebut2.08Say It Ain't SoPortrayed byJamie ClaytonGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanOccupationLaw enforcementAliasAgent Grace PowellRelationshipsFamilyUnnamed fatherJenna Cameron(sister)FateStatusAlive Jenna Cameron(sister) Charlotte "Charlie" Cameronis a character introduced in the second season of The CW's television seriesRoswell, New Mexico. She isJenna Cameron's older sister. Under the alias AgentGrace Powell, she "arrives in Roswell to investigate a string of disappearances."[1]Charlie is portrayed byJamie Clayton. Charlie cares greatly for her sister.

characters.name: Chiana
characters.description: ChianaAppears inRoswell, New MexicoDebut1.09Songs About TexasPortrayed byTenaya TorresGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanOccupationWorks withArizona Chianais a character in The CW 2019 television seriesRoswell, New Mexico. She is an indigenous woman who helpsArizonatour as a faith healer. Chiana is portrayed by Tenaya Torres. Chiana is an older indigenous woman who grew up on the Navajo reservation not far from Roswell, New Mexico.[1]She was aware ofLouise Truman's work on the reservation as a healer. characters.name: Clyde
characters.description: ClydeAppears inRoswell, New MexicoDebut4.01Steal My SunshinePortrayed byAndrew LeesGenderMaleSpeciesOasianRelationshipsTriadBonnie,TezcaFateStatusDeceased Clydeis a character in The CW 2019 television seriesRoswell, New Mexico, first introduced inseason 4, and portrayed byAndrew Lees. Clyde is "part of a duo of thieves robbing Roswell’s banks, determined to steal back what’s rightfully theirs. He is a man with deeply held beliefs, fighting to keep his family on the right path — and sees a potential ally inMichael".[1] Clyde is a very handsome and wickedly charming man with dark brown hair and hazel eyes. He is slim, but muscular. He keeps his hair groomed to a neat length and he has an bit of facial hair to give him the appearance of a country man. TBA

She is portrayed by Sara Downing. Courtney worked as a waitress at theCrashdown Cafe. In reality, Courtney was an alienSkinwho landed in Copper Summit, Arizona in 1950 as part of an invasion force sent byKivarto capture theRoyal Four. characters.name: Dallas
characters.description: DallasAppears inRoswell, New MexicoDebutSeason 3Portrayed byQuentin PlairAnthony B. Jenkins(young)GenderMaleSpeciesOasianOccupationPreacher (formerly)AliasEquation KeeperMain powersTelepathic CommunicationTelekinesisHydrokinesisRelationshipsFamilyTheo(father)†FriendsHeath TuchmanRomancesMaria DeLuca(kissed)FateStatusAlive Dallasis a character inseason 3of The CW 2019 television seriesRoswell, New Mexico. He is "charmingly enigmatic preacher with the ability to divine people’s troubles and provide them with the counsel they seek." Dallas is portrayed byQuentin Plair.[1] Dallas is "thoughtful and well-versed in many religions. He has a passion for music and is able to quote scripture and lyrics from Biggie Smalls in the same breath. Dallas draws others into his orbit with his unique outlook on the big mysteries of life and will cross paths with Rosa during a pivotal point on her road to recovery."[1] Dallas is "thoughtful and well-versed in many religions. He has a passion for music and is able to quote scripture and lyrics from Biggie Smalls in the same breath. Dallas draws others into his orbit with his unique outlook on the big mysteries of life and will cross paths with Rosa during a pivotal point on her road to recovery."[1]

characters.name: Daniel Summers
characters.description: Daniel SummersAppears inRoswellGenderMaleSpeciesHumanOccupationHead ofSpecial UnitAllegianceSpecial UnitFateStatusDeceasedDate of deathMay 2, 1999Cause of deathKilled byNasedo Agent Daniel Summersis a character mentioned on WB sci-fi seriesRoswell. AgentDaniel Summerswas personally responsible for bringingDaniel Pierceinto theSpecial Unit. When Summers was found dead on May 2, 1999, Pierce replaced him as Head Agent.

characters.description: DarbyAppears inRoswell, New MexicoDebut3.06Bitter Sweet SymphonyPortrayed byJasmine GonzalezGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanFateStatusAlive Darbyis a character in The CW 2019 television seriesRoswell, New Mexico, first introduced inseason 3. She works forDeep Sky. Darby is portrayed by Jasmine Gonzalez. Darby has pink hair.

characters.name: Del Bianco
characters.description: Del BiancoOccupationHead ofSpecial UnitFateStatusDeceasedCause of deathKilled byNasedoin 1967Del Biancois a character mentioned onSeason 1of WB sci-fi seriesRoswell. Del Bianco replacedLewisas Head Agent of the F.B.I.'sSpecial Investigations Unit. Agent Del Bianco was found dead in Union City, Tennessee in 1967.[1]

characters.name: Maria DeLuca(books)
characters.description: audiobook cover versionMaria DeLucaDebutBook 1:The OutsiderGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanOccupationHigh school student, waitressRelationshipsFamilyMargaret "Mimi" DeLuca (mother)Kevin DeLuca (younger brother)Sassafras (cat)Mr. DeLuca (father)FriendsLiz OrtechoAlex ManesMax EvansIsabel EvansMichael GuerinRomancesMichael GuerinFateStatusAlive Maria DeLucais a main character in theRoswell Highbook series. She is a junior in high school,[1]and she learns about the existence of aliens whenMax Evansuses his powers to healLiz Ortechoright in front of her. Maria has curly blonde hair, blue eyes, and fair skin.[2][3][4] Maria is a student atUlysses F. Olsen High, and she works as a waitress at theCrashdown Cafe. Her best friends are Liz Ortecho andAlex Manes, and Maria is the one who tells Alex about aliens because she's scared. Their friendship group later expands to include Max Evans,Isabel Evans, andMichael Guerin. Maria develops a romantic interest in Michael. Maria is really into using aromatherapy, and she'll pull out vials of scents for her friends when she thinks they need them. She avoids processed foods, but makes exceptions such as for pizza. Maria lives with her mother Margaret "Mimi" DeLuca, her younger brother Kevin, and her cat Sassafras. Maria's parents have gotten a divorce, and her father lives separately across town. Her mother has begun dating again, which bothers Maria, and often leaves Maria and Kevin home alone in the evenings.[6][7]

Her mother has begun dating again, which bothers Maria, and often leaves Maria and Kevin home alone in the evenings.[6][7]

Her mother has begun dating again, which bothers Maria, and often leaves Maria and Kevin home alone in the evenings.[6][7]

characters.name: Mimi DeLuca
characters.description: Mimi DeLucaDebut1.07I Saw the SignPortrayed bySherri SaumGenderFemaleSpeciesHuman-OasianHybridOccupationBarkeeper(Formerly)Fortune Teller(Formerly)Main powersClairvoyanceAura ReadingPalm ReadingRelationshipsFamilyMaria DeLuca(daughter)Mr. DeLuca(father)Patricia DeLuca(mother)Isobel Evans-Bracken(half-aunt)Louise Truman(grandmother)Roy Bronson(grandfather)FateStatusDeceasedMimi DeLucais a character onThe CWscience fiction seriesRoswell, New Mexico. She was the mother ofMaria DeLucaand she suffered from an unknown mental disorder until her death in Season 4. Mimi is a palm reader and psychic, and her daughter Maria takes after her. It is suggested that she does have some real psychic abilities, such as being able to read auras and having clairvoyant insight into people. With her mental deterioration, she also believes that the events of the movieIndependence Dayactually occurred. It is occasionally unclear whether what she says is psychic insight, highly developed (but normal human) awareness, or part of her mental deterioration. Mimi went to school withJesse Manes, and she noticed the day that he "learned too much." Mimi is a palm reader and psychic, and her daughter Maria takes after her. With her mental deterioration, she also believes that the events of the movieIndependence Dayactually occurred. It is occasionally unclear whether what she says is psychic insight, highly developed (but normal human) awareness, or part of her mental deterioration.
